CS2 Premier

Loading

Setup

Tracks Premier rating expiry from Steam Personal Game Data. Browser must be logged into Steam. No Steam password, no backend.

  1. Allow Steam access
  2. Sync Steam data
  3. Timer ready

Settings

Color settings coming later.

Use the main button to sync Steam data. If Steam asks you to sign in, leave the opened GCPD tabs open until sync finishes.
